C

CACHE - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.SpriteOverlayFactory
Image cache: sprite key → loaded Image.
callback - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.FleetPlacementThread
 
callback - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.MachineTurnThread
 
cancelSelection() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
canPlace(ShipType, Coordinate, Orientation) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Board
Non-mutating check for whether a ship of the given type could be placed at the given head/orientation right now, without actually placing it.
Cell - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Represents a single cell on a board: its coordinate, its current visual/logical state, and (if any) the ship occupying it.
Cell(Coordinate) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Cell
Creates a new, empty water cell at the given coordinate.
CELL_ARC - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
Corner radius used for board cells, frigates, and aircraft carrier end caps.
CELL_GAP - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
Total visual gap perceived between two adjacent water cells (split as half-padding on each cell).
CELL_SIZE - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
Full logical size of one cell.
CellClickAdapter() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.CellClickAdapter
 
CellHoverAdapter(Coordinate) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.CellHoverAdapter
 
cellRectangles - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
 
CellState - Enum Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums
Represents the visual and logical state of a single board cell.
CellState() - Constructor for enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.CellState

clear() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Cell
Clears this cell back to empty, unshot water.
clearAll() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Removes all overlays (ships and markers) from the overlay layer.
clearAllMarkers() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Removes all marker overlays (hit and miss) from the overlay layer.
clearAllShipOverlays() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Removes every ship overlay from the overlay layer.
clearHoverPreview() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
clearSelection() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController

coordinate - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Cell
 
coordinate - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Shot
 
Coordinate - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Immutable representation of a single board position.
Coordinate(int, int) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate
Creates a coordinate from zero-based row and column indices.
createCellRectangle() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
 
createEndCap(double, boolean, Orientation) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
Builds a single cell-sized end cap: a fully rounded square unioned with a plain half-rectangle covering the inward half, which masks the rounding away on the side facing the rest of the ship and leaves it only on the outward-facing corners.
createHeaderLabel(String) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
 
createHitDot(int, Orientation) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
 
createHitMarker() - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.MarkerShapeFactory
Creates the "hit" marker: a solid red circle centered in the cell, sized to fully cover the darker hit-point dot already drawn on the underlying ship body.
createHitOverlay() - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.SpriteOverlayFactory
Creates an ImageView overlay for a hit marker (hit.png).
createMissMarker() - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.MarkerShapeFactory
Creates the "water" / miss marker: a thick, rounded white X centered in the cell.
createMissOverlay() - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.SpriteOverlayFactory
Creates an ImageView overlay for a miss marker (miss.png).
createPointedEndCap(boolean, Orientation) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
 
createSegmentPiece(int, int, Orientation) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
 
createShipNode(ShipType, Orientation) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
Convenience overload using the default "ship-body" style class.
createShipNode(ShipType, Orientation, String) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
Creates the visual body of a ship, including the darker hit-point dots marking where each segment will show a hit marker later.
createShipOverlay(ShipType, Orientation) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.SpriteOverlayFactory
Convenience overload for a live (not sunk) ship overlay.
createShipOverlay(ShipType, Orientation, boolean) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.SpriteOverlayFactory
Creates an ImageView overlay for a ship body sprite.
createTrayEntry(ShipType) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.ShipTrayView
 
createUniformRoundedSquare(double) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
 
currentInstructionPage - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Zero-based index of the currently visible tutorial page.
